query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'users' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('phoneMobile','cnp','ciSeries','ciNumber','ciExpiry','ciIssuedBy','iban','bankName','emergencyContact','emergencyPhone','emergencyRelation','bloodType','allergies','profileNotes');
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user h1jFeiTyrASEJ6W.root --database 2gvgk32MDhEEiC7DrEzbf4 --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'users' AND COLUMN_NAME IN ('phoneMobile','cnp','ciSeries','ciNumber','ciExpiry','ciIssuedBy','iban','bankName','emergencyContact','emergencyPhone','emergencyRelation','bloodType','allergies','profileNotes');
stdout:
COLUMN_NAME	COLUMN_TYPE
cnp	varchar(13)
ciSeries	varchar(4)
ciNumber	varchar(10)
ciExpiry	date
ciIssuedBy	varchar(128)
iban	varchar(34)
bankName	varchar(128)
emergencyContact	varchar(128)
emergencyPhone	varchar(32)
emergencyRelation	varchar(64)
bloodType	enum('A+','A-','B+','B-','AB+','AB-','O+','O-')
allergies	text
profileNotes	text
phoneMobile	varchar(32)
